justification: The diff correctly migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) by replacing annotations (@Before -> @BeforeEach, @Test) and assertions (Assert -> Assertions), and updates the Maven compiler release to 21. The removal of the JUnit 4 dependency and addition of JUnit Jupiter is appropriate. However, the migration doesn't fully leverage Java 21 idioms beyond the version bump (e.g., no pattern matching for switch or records are introduced, though the codebase is simple). The diff is coherent with no spurious changes.
